original_filename: Wu et al. (2025) - Human-generative AI collaboration enhances task performance but undermines human’s intrinsic motivation.pdf

decisions.reason: Wu et al. (2025) - Human-GenAI collab + intrinsic motivation. High-priority for next session.

Override of prior DEFER. Sister-study to hai-dark-side-collaboration-2025. 4 pre-registered RCTs (N=3,562) provide experimental causal evidence for motivation/boredom face of psychological deprivation. Article-type: source distillation + UPDATEs to existing concepts.

Source distillation moved to sources/wu-collaboration-motivation-2025.md. 5 UPDATEs applied: agency, professional-identity-threat, ai-self-efficacy-erosion, strategic-alternation, performance-paradox. No NEW concepts. Aux scripts run (sync-source-links, build-index, update_readme_counts). KB counts: 71→72 sources, 140→141 total.
